name: fixed_static_pool_control
purpose: Shows any benefit is not just the preallocated max capacity.
expected_effect: Lifecycle-enabled path must beat or differ from fixed active mask only on lifecycle-pressure tasks.

name: random_event_replay_control
purpose: Matches event count while destroying event causality.
expected_effect: Random matched events should not reproduce lineage/trophic/task benefit.

name: active_mask_shuffle_control
purpose: Destroys identity-to-slot binding while preserving active count.
expected_effect: Mask shuffle should break lineage-specific or specialist reuse claims.

name: lineage_id_shuffle_control
purpose: Checks whether lineage bookkeeping is causal or decorative.
expected_effect: Lineage shuffle should damage lineage-dependent claims without changing raw capacity.

name: no_trophic_pressure_control
purpose: Removes ecology pressure while leaving state machinery alive.
expected_effect: No-trophic path should lose lifecycle selection-specific effects.

name: no_dopamine_or_plasticity_control
purpose: Separates lifecycle bookkeeping from actual learning/reward coupling.
expected_effect: No learning/plasticity should not pass task-effect gates.
